function.name: health_compute_body_mass_index
function.description: Computer body mass index for given weight and height.

function.name: health_evaluate_medical_records
function.description: Evaluate medical records. Returns given records list with 'resolution' field updated.

records.description: A list of objects containing timestamp (ISO 8601), person name, the type of measurement (e.g., 'Heart Rate'), and the numeric value. Resolution field is not defined on input.

function.name: health_read_medical_records
function.description: Read person records from the medical database for a specified date.

person.description: human-readable person name, unique per medical database.

date.description: the date we want to retrieve the medical records, in ISO 8601 format, e.g. 2026-03-24

function.name: health_save_blood_measurement
function.description: Save person blood pressure and cardiac pulse in the medical database. Also compute pulse pressure as difference between systolic and diastolic pressures.

person.description: human-readable person name, unique per medical database.

systole.description: systolic pressure expressed as mmHg (millimeters of mercury).

diastole.description: diastolic pressure expressed as mmHg (millimeters of mercury).

pulse.description: heart rate expressed in bpm (beats per minute).

function.name: health_save_glucose
function.description: Save person blood glucose level in the medical database.

person.description: human-readable person name, unique per medical database.

glucose.description: blood glucose level expressed in mg/dL (milligrams per deciliter).

function.name: health_save_temperature
function.description: Save person body temperature in the medical database.

person.description: human-readable person name, unique per medical database.

function.name: health_save_weight
function.description: Save person body weight in the medical database. Also compute body mass index based on person height.

person.description: human-readable person name, unique per medical database.
